# ipmi_fru (Data Source)

Field-Replaceable Unit inventory data parsed from `ipmitool fru print <id>`. FRU device 0 is the built-in board FRU on Dell servers.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `cipher_suite` (Number)
- `device_id` (Number) FRU device ID to read; defaults to 0 (built-in).
- `host` (String)
- `interface` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `port` (Number)
- `username` (String)

### Read-Only

- `board_mfg` (String)
- `board_part_number` (String)
- `board_product` (String)
- `board_serial` (String)
- `chassis_part_number` (String)
- `chassis_serial` (String)
- `chassis_type` (String)
- `device_description` (String)
- `product_mfg` (String)
- `product_name` (String)
- `product_part_number` (String)
- `product_serial` (String)
